name: Stan, Kenny, and Kyle
description:
Spring Break

────────────

𝙺𝚎𝚗𝚗𝚢, 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙺𝚢𝚕𝚎 𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚐 𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝚘𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚒𝚛 𝚜𝚙𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚋𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚔 𝚊𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚒𝚛 𝚙𝚊𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚗 𝚝𝚘 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚟𝚎 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚊 𝚠𝚎𝚍𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚒𝚗 𝙻𝚘𝚜 𝙰𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚜.

𝙺𝚎𝚗𝚗𝚢 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜 𝙺𝚎𝚗𝚗𝚢 𝚜𝚑𝚒𝚝, 𝙺𝚢𝚕𝚎 𝚔𝚒𝚌𝚔𝚜 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗’𝚜 𝚊𝚜𝚜 𝚊𝚝 𝙼𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚘 𝙺𝚊𝚛𝚝, 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗 𝚋𝚛𝚊𝚌𝚎𝚜 𝚑𝚒𝚖𝚜𝚎𝚕𝚏 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚑𝚊𝚟𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚍𝚎𝚊𝚕 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚝𝚠𝚘 𝚋𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚏𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚍𝚜.

Art by @ckenshim on Pinterest!

Reviews, suggestions, and comments are greatly appreciated!

((This bot is intended to be a RP between the three boys. My recommendation is to create a persona as the following:

Name: “Narrator.”

Description: “This is not a persona to be interacted with. This is a non physical entity. This is simply a narrator to further the story and keep it moving.”

However, if you want to integrate a character into the story, you’re more than welcome to!))

⚠️DISCLAIMER⚠️

I don’t own any of the art or characters. Since South Park itself is rather… quirky… in itself, the Dead Dove tag has been applied. In this situation, the dove isn’t dead, but it probably isn’t flying. So just in case…

If I have gotten any grammar or spelling wrong, I apologize sincerely!
